name: Narrow Storage Cabinet with Pull Out Cart White - Brightroom™: Utility Cart, Rolling Casters, Particle Board, 45" Height
description:
Get attractive and super-functional storage with this Narrow Storage Cabinet with Pull-Out Cart from Brightroom™. The cabinet features one open shelf on top and three more shelves inside the pull-out cart. The cart comes with wheels and a handle so it can easily be moved from one room to another — try using it in the laundry room to store detergent and other necessities as well as extra bedding and towels. The narrow silhouette is perfect for smaller spaces, and the crisp white color makes it easy to match with a range of decor styles and palettes.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
